+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [New Model]: Qwen2.5-VL",
+        "description": "Add support for Qwen2.5-VL, one of the most popular and anticipated vision language models, to vLLM!\n\nTODO:\n\nTo run this model before transformers 4.49 release, install transformers from source \n```pip install git+https://github.com/huggingface/transformers```\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."

+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",

+      }
